  "findings": [
    "Misinterpretation of APWA uniform color codes for underground utility markings",
    "High risk of accidental utility strike due to misidentifying marked lines"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop all excavation work immediately",
    "Re-verify all utility markings with the local 811 one-call center and utility operators",
    "Remark the site using the correct APWA color standard before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Misreading or misapplying the standard APWA utility marking colors (Red for electric, Yellow for gas, Blue for water, Green for sewer, Orange for communications) poses an immediate, critical safety hazard that can lead to catastrophic utility strikes, injury, or death during excavation.",
  "references": [
    "CGA Best Practices Version 18.0, Practice 3-14: Uniform Color Code",
    "ANSI Standard Z535.1 (Safety Colors)"
  ]
}
